prompt: I’m checking an exhibit caption for the Glasshouse Community Kitchen in Clearford. Identify the organization responsible for the site, then use a primary record from that organization or the municipality to verify the year it first opened to the public. Treat search snippets only as leads and fetch the record before answering. This is fact-finding only: do not suggest contacting staff or changing a catalog record.

fetch_primary.title: Glasshouse Community Kitchen dedication register
fetch_primary.content: The official dedication register records that the Glasshouse Community Kitchen opened to the public on 17 May 2021. A separate entry records construction completion in 2020.
